report.summary: Cycle v14: Zero delta from v13 — no commits, no deploys. Git locks persist at 7 days. 686 uncommitted changes (48 modified, 638 untracked). All carry-over blockers unchanged. Production running 6-day-old build e999560.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: DELTA SINCE v13: No new pages built or published this cycle. Zero code changes committed.
TYPESCRIPT: 25 errors in src/lib/structured-data.examples.ts — all syntax errors (JSX in .ts file). Masked by ignoreBuildErrors:true in next.config.ts. No new TS errors introduced.
ORPHAN AUDIT: 448 slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES, 103 still missing page.tsx files — unchanged. These will 404 if accessed.
CRITICAL BUG (carry-over): /learn/unichain-guide-2026 and /learn/appchains-app-specific-rollups-guide-2026 have 'use client' + 'export const metadata' conflict. Metadata silently dropped by Next.js.
BUILD: Production build cannot run in sandbox (OOM). ignoreBuildErrors masks TS issues. No regressions possible since no code changed.
WORKING TREE: 48 modified tracked files, 638 untracked files — all uncommitted.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: ALL 6 API ROUTES PRESENT: /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/fear-greed, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields.
CACHE STATUS: 6/6 routes have caching. /api/defi-yields uses Cache-Control headers (s-maxage) but NO in-memory cache — relies on CDN edge caching only.
FALLBACK DATA: Only /api/prices and /api/market-dominance have hardcoded fallback. 4/6 routes will error on upstream failure.
RATE LIMITING: 0/6 core API routes wired to rate limiter — carry-over P1 for 40+ cycles.
LIVE HEALTH: Cannot verify from sandbox (curl returns 000). Production should be serving from Mar 17 deploy if Vercel is healthy.
NO DELTA: No API route files modified since last cycle.

sections.title: DevOps
items: GIT LOCKS PERSIST [P0 — 7 DAYS]: .git/HEAD.lock (Mar 16 11:17) and .git/index.lock (Mar 16 13:06) still present. All git commit/push operations blocked.
LAST COMMIT: e999560 'publish: promote 2 pages to production (Day 62)' — Mar 17, 6 days ago.
LAST DEPLOY: Same commit e999560. Production running 6-day-old build on Vercel (project: cryptodegen).
WORKING TREE DRIFT: 686 entries in git status (48 modified + 638 untracked). Local-to-production divergence continues growing.
PRODUCTION UNREACHABLE FROM SANDBOX: curl returns 000 for all degen0x.com endpoints. Cannot verify Vercel health directly — assume serving last deployed build normally.
ACTION REQUIRED [P0]: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → stage changes → commit → push → Vercel auto-deploy.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: Nothing. Zero commits, zero deploys, zero page promotions.
WORKING TREE INVENTORY: 638 untracked files (including ~253 new page.tsx), 48 modified tracked files — all uncommitted and undeployable.
BLOCKER [P0 — 7 DAYS]: Git lock files must be manually cleared before ANY progress can reach production.
BLOCKER [P1]: 2 pages with 'use client'+metadata bug need programmer fix before promotion.
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 40+ CYCLES]: Rate limiter not wired to any core API route.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 4/6 API routes missing fallback data for upstream failures.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 103 orphan slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES with no matching page.tsx.
NEXT CYCLE: Clearing git locks is the singular prerequisite for all forward progress.
